Based in Bangalore

Designed for playful days, made for all-day comfort

Based in Bangalore, shipping across Tamil Nadu (Chennai, Salem) and worldwide. We design skin-friendly, lightweight cotton wear for playful days. Every piece is made for all-day comfort.

The Collection

Three essential sets, crafted in soft cotton blends for ages 0–10 years. Limited summer drop.

Ages 1-10 Bestseller

Bird & Plant Print Top + Olive Striped Pants

Cream short-sleeve top with birds, potted plants and Easter eggs paired with olive-green striped pants.

White Floral Top + Red Ruffled Shorts

Bright, breathable and beautifully comfy. White floral top paired with cheerful red shorts – made for playful days.

Size Guide

Find the perfect fit. All measurements are in inches. If between sizes, we recommend sizing up for longer wear.

0-1
2-4
6-8
Ages 0–10 years
Age Chest Length (Top) Bottom
0–1 yr 18" 12–14" 14–16"
1–2 yrs 20" 15" 16–18"
2–4 yrs 22" 17" 19–21"
4–6 yrs 24" 19" 22–24"
6–8 yrs 26" 21" 24–26"
8–10 yrs 28" 23" 26–28"

Handmade with love — slight variations are part of the charm. Pre-washed for softness.
